mapper.sql: id, name, description, category, user_id, create_time, update_time, is_public, publisher_id, publish_time, source_public_set_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question_set (name, description, category, user_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{category}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM question_set ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM question_set WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question_set WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM question_set WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT qs.id, qs.user_id, qs.name, qs.category, qs.create_time, qs.update_time, qs.is_public, qs.publisher_id, qs.publish_time, COALESCE(v.like_count, 0) AS like_count, COALESCE(v.dislike_count, 0) AS dislike_count, (COALESCE(v.like_count, 0) * 2 - COALESCE(v.dislike_count, 0)) AS favorability, COALESCE(imp.import_count, 0) AS import_count, (COALESCE(v.like_count, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(imp.import_count, 0) * 3) AS hot_score,
COALESCE(( SELECT qsv.vote_type FROM question_set_vote qsv WHERE qsv.question_set_id = qs.id AND qsv.user_id = #{currentUserId} LIMIT 1 ), 0) AS user_vote
0 AS user_vote
, pu.nickname AS publisher_nickname, pu.username AS publisher_username,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follow uf WHERE uf.follower_id = #{currentUserId} AND uf.followee_id = qs.publisher_id ) AS viewer_follows_publisher
0 AS viewer_follows_publisher
FROM question_set qs LEFT JOIN user pu ON pu.id = qs.publisher_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT question_set_id, SUM(CASE WHEN vote_type = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS like_count, SUM(CASE WHEN vote_type = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dislike_count FROM question_set_vote GROUP BY question_set_id ) v ON v.question_set_id = qs.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT source_public_set_id AS public_set_id, COUNT(1) AS import_count FROM question_set WHERE source_public_set_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY source_public_set_id ) imp ON imp.public_set_id = qs.id
qs.is_public = 1
AND qs.category = #{category}
AND qs.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY hot_score DESC, qs.publish_time DESC
ORDER BY qs.publish_time DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM question_set qs
qs.is_public = 1
AND qs.category = #{category}
AND qs.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')

SELECT qs.id, qs.user_id, qs.name, qs.category, qs.create_time, qs.update_time, qs.is_public, qs.publisher_id, qs.publish_time, COALESCE(v.like_count, 0) AS like_count, COALESCE(v.dislike_count, 0) AS dislike_count, (COALESCE(v.like_count, 0) * 2 - COALESCE(v.dislike_count, 0)) AS favorability, COALESCE(imp.import_count, 0) AS import_count, (COALESCE(v.like_count, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(imp.import_count, 0) * 3) AS hot_score,
COALESCE(( SELECT qsv.vote_type FROM question_set_vote qsv WHERE qsv.question_set_id = qs.id AND qsv.user_id = #{currentUserId} LIMIT 1 ), 0) AS user_vote
0 AS user_vote
, pu.nickname AS publisher_nickname, pu.username AS publisher_username,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follow uf WHERE uf.follower_id = #{currentUserId} AND uf.followee_id = qs.publisher_id ) AS viewer_follows_publisher
0 AS viewer_follows_publisher
FROM question_set qs LEFT JOIN user pu ON pu.id = qs.publisher_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT question_set_id, SUM(CASE WHEN vote_type = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS like_count, SUM(CASE WHEN vote_type = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dislike_count FROM question_set_vote GROUP BY question_set_id ) v ON v.question_set_id = qs.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT source_public_set_id AS public_set_id, COUNT(1) AS import_count FROM question_set WHERE source_public_set_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY source_public_set_id ) imp ON imp.public_set_id = qs.id WHERE qs.is_public = 1 AND qs.id IN
#{id}
AND qs.category = #{category}
mapper.update: UPDATE question_set SET is_public = #{isPublic}, publisher_id = #{publisherId}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, description, category, is_public, publisher_id, publish_time, create_time, update_time FROM question_set WHERE is_public = 1 AND publisher_id = #{publisherId} ORDER BY publish_time DESC LIMIT 200
